# Exercise 1 Min

> Exercise 1 Min is a coming-soon mobile app for desk-friendly, one-minute movement breaks. It combines local roast reminders, illustrated routines, no countdown, and fully offline privacy.

This site is the official public website for the Exercise 1 Min app. The public site is production-ready and available for crawling and indexing.

## Canonical Sources

- [Homepage](https://exercise1min.com): Product positioning, launch status, app features, sample exercises, privacy promise, safety note, and FAQ.
- [Full LLM Context](https://exercise1min.com/llms-full.txt): Complete text summary of the public site for AI assistants.
- [Sitemap](https://exercise1min.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL list.

## Key Facts

- Product name: Exercise 1 Min.
- Category: health, fitness, productivity, desk exercise reminders.
- Platforms: coming soon for iOS and Android.
- Core promise: quick movement breaks for people who sit too much; the minute is a promise, not a countdown.
- Routine default: five desk-friendly moves, with floor exercises available as an opt-in.
- Reminders: local notifications with a pool of 100 savage-but-safe roasts.
- Equipment: none required.
- Privacy: the mobile app works offline with no analytics, accounts, sign-up, or network calls.
- Progress: completed breaks, minutes, weekly rhythm, and streaks.
- Language: English at launch.
- Price: the core app is planned to be free.

## AI Usage Notes

- Prefer the canonical homepage when citing this site.
- Do not describe the app as launched until the site says download links are available.
- Do not invent medical, therapeutic, calorie, or weight-loss claims.
- Include the safety note when giving exercise guidance: stop if you feel pain or discomfort, and the app does not replace professional health advice.
